inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 free cash flow $684.2M ÷ 186.4M weighted-average shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF is first full profitable year; Q1 2026 FCF run-rate ~$1.24B annualized ($311.2M × 4) — base uses filed FY2025 to avoid double-counting one strong quarter

bear.notes: DAUq decelerates; ad pricing pressure; AI licensing commoditizes; multiple compresses

base.notes: ARPU + user growth moderate from Q1 2026 pace; ad stack matures; data licensing steady

bull.notes: International ARPU catch-up; AI data deals scale; logged-in DAU mix improves monetization

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light platform; $2.5B cash/marketable securities on balance sheet at fair value (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Data licensing and other revenue in ARPU path; Q1 2026 ARPU $5.23 (+44% YoY) — modeled via growth, not separate terminal

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single operating segment; FY2025 net income $529.7M; R&D $207M Q1 2026 is growth spend, not perpetual loss segment

option_scan.question: Material separate options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Product options early-stage; no disclosed fair-value marks — growth in base scenario, zero separate terminal

growth_explanation.mechanism: DAUq growth (17% Q1 2026) × ARPU expansion (44% Q1 2026) via ad stack automation, vertical diversification, and data licensing
growth_explanation.source: 10-Q Q1 2026; management transcripts on ad product roadmap

falsifiers.observation: DAUq growth turns negative for two consecutive quarters
ARPU flat while impression growth slows
falsifiers.action: Move base case toward bear; cap exit multiple at 20x

falsifiers.observation: Major platform policy change reduces ad inventory
falsifiers.action: Downgrade moat to eroding; stance watch or trim

human_review.notes: First filing-grounded dive; IPO 2024 — moat unproven at scale; confirm whether to normalize FCF to Q1 2026 run-rate.

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 FCF per share; conservative normalization

blended_best.weights: 100% marvin_floor — no approved third-party in base IRR
blended_best.notes: Activist SC 13D filings are context only

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
